3166730.name: Forest Time
3166730.description:
Welcome to Forest Time–a game in which turn-based tactical gameplay is made cozy and peaceful.

Enjoy a wide variety of gentle tactical puzzles, charming characters, and a warm atmosphere. Carefully plan your actions to get everything done in a limited number of turns, or experiment and explore. The game doesn't punish mistakes, so you can learn by trying things out.

Key Features

- Family-friendly and cozy

- Relaxed pacing

- Turn-based gameplay with plenty of time to consider your actions and experiment

- A variety of task-based puzzles that reward careful planning and clever use of the character's abilities

- Distinct characters to meet and play

- Seasonal and thematic levels (including a Halloween set)

What Forest Time has to offer

1. 50+ levels grouped in three sets.

2. A variety of tactical tasks that make up each unique level.

3. 8 playable characters, each with their own ability and personality.

4. Short dialogues and stories to set up the atmosphere.

5. Charming and minimalist visuals.

What the game doesn't have

Please note that Forest Time has simplistic visual effects and sound design. We plan to enhance these aspects in future updates and add some quality-of-life improvements.

Besides that, Forest Time is first of all designed to be a puzzle-like tactical experience. It doesn't offer any of the following features:

1. Character progression or leveling up.

2. Inventory or crafting systems.

3. Multiplayer or competitive modes.

4. Complex storylines or quests.

Our plans for the near future

We plan to continue improving Forest Time after the initial release.

For the Winter 2026, we aim to:

1. Improve the sound design and visual effects

2. Add more quality-of-life improvements

3. Add a few new levels to the base game and especially to the Grumpy Grove level set.

Further into 2026, we plan to:

1. Work on new level sets with new characters and mechanics, namely a winter-themed set and one more Japanese autumn-themed set. These new sets will come as DLC for the base game.

2. Add localization to the game.

Your feedback is highly appreciated

Forest Time is an indie game made by a small team of enthusiastic people. We highly value your feedback and suggestions. Please feel free to reach out to us via our social media channels or use the Steam discussion forum to share your thoughts, ideas or issues. Feel free to e-mail us if you prefer.
